title: Crispy Chicken Skillet
description: A simple skillet recipe with crispy chicken and Canadian spices.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with Canadian seasoning.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, chop the onion and bell pepper.
Once the chicken is done, remove the skillet from the oven and add the chopped onion and bell pepper.
Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the crispy chicken with the sautéed vegetables.
